title: Placeable Plants
description: Allows you to place vegetation on almost all blocks.
body:
# Placeable Plants > **Fill your world with greenery!** This small mod allows you to **place vegetation** on almost **all blocks**. You just need to install this mod on the server. ![Short Grass on a cobblestone street](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/fAK8ggGH/images/665f0e538b4c0891b0dca00cf5b3641fe2169516.png) ## 🍂Compatible Plants - All Saplings - Mushrooms and Funguses - Short and Tall Grass - Fern and Tall Fern - Short and Tall Dry Grass - Bush - Firefly Bush - Sweet Berries - Dead Bush - Bamboo - All Short and Tall Flowers (_including pink petals and wildflowers_) - Crimson and Warped Roots - Nether Sprouts - Weeping and Twisting Vines ## 🔗External Links |Nico4play's|Bisumto's| |--|--| |

|

|
